allow:
Bash(git -C "H:\git\etnopapers" commit -m "Fix: Correct Gemini API call - remove unsupported systemInstruction

The Gemini v1 generateContent API does not support systemInstruction as a
separate field. Instead, include system instructions in the user message.

Changes:
- Remove systemInstruction field from request body
- Include system prompt in the user message text
- Use gemini-1.5-flash model for better performance
- Combine instructions and extraction request in single message

Fixes: ""Unknown name systemInstruction"" error from Gemini API

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git -C "H:\git\etnopapers" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Feature: Add Gemini model selection and dynamic loading

Implements:
1. New geminiModels service to list available Gemini models
   - Fetch models from Gemini API''s /models endpoint
   - Filter for models supporting generateContent
   - Fallback to default models if API call fails

2. Update APIKeySetup component:
   - Add model dropdown that appears after Gemini validation
   - Load available models when API key is validated
   - Allow user to select and save preferred model
   - Store selected model in localStorage

3. Update geminiClient:
   - Read selected model from localStorage
   - Use dynamic model in API calls instead of hardcoded
   - Fallback to gemini-pro if no model selected

This allows users to:
- Automatically discover available models
- Select the best model for their use case
- Have selection persist across sessions

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
